description: One decoded CSV record. Row order is controlled by order_key.

layout.description: Sparse lexical exceptions. Omit this object for canonical quoting and the table terminator.

force_quote.description: Minimal unpadded base64url bitset, least-significant bit first, forcing otherwise-unnecessary quotes for selected fields; trailing zero bytes are omitted.

terminator.description: An exceptional row ending. The empty string means no final terminator.
